channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Photos: US storms bring heavy snow, dangerous ice and a tornado in California
item.description: In San Francisco, authorities issued the first-ever tornado warning. Meanwhile, upstate New York saw heavy snow, the Midwest encountered an ice storm, and severe weather warnings were issued around Lake Tahoe.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pelosi 'on the mend' after hip replacement surgery in Germany
item.description: "Speaker Pelosi is enjoying the overwhelming outpouring of prayers and well wishes," Ian Krager said.
item.dc:creator: Steff Danielle Thomas, NewsNation

item.title: New Jersey teacher taped 9-year-old boy to desk for nearly an hour, police say
item.description: A teacher in New Jersey was charged after he allegedly taped a nine-year-old student to his desk, while a teacher's aide was accused of failing to intervene.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bolivia holds a divisive popular vote for its top judges, offering lessons for the region
item.description: LA PAZ, Bolivia (AP) — Campaigning for Sunday's judicial election may be strictly forbidden, but look closer on the streets of Bolivia’s capital, La Paz, and you’ll find that some candidates have sneakily plastered their faces on packs of corn puffs and others have slipped subtle slogans into offici
item.dc:creator: PAOLA FLORES and ISABEL DEBRE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter wins Heisman Trophy as college football's top player
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Travis Hunter turned every play into prime time — on both sides of the ball — and ultimately took home the Heisman Trophy. Now he’s got a leg up on his celebrity coach at Colorado.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: ABC agrees to give $15 million to Donald Trump's presidential library to settle defamation lawsuit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — ABC News has agreed to pay $15 million toward Donald Trump’s presidential library to settle a defamation lawsuit over anchor George Stephanopoulos' inaccurate on-air assertion that the president-elect had been found civilly liable for raping writer E. Jean Carroll.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump gets warm welcome as he watches Army-Navy game alongside key allies, nominees and Daniel Penny
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump huddled with allies and a Republican cause célèbre at Saturday's Army-Navy football game, taking in one of the most storied rivalries in college sports while spotlighting his emerging national security team.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, TARA COPP and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 6 ways to avoid a financial holiday hangover
item.description: The festivity of December is replaced all too quickly by the due dates of January, when the bills from holiday spending and travel arrive.
item.dc:creator: Kimberly Palmer, ABC 4

item.title: Storms encase Iowa and eastern Nebraska in ice and generate rare tornado warning in San Francisco
item.description: A major ice storm created treacherous driving conditions across Iowa and eastern Nebraska this weekend and prompted temporary closures of Interstate 80 after numerous cars and trucks slid off the road.
item.dc:creator: Josh Funk, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI whistleblower found dead in San Francisco apartment from apparent suicide
item.description: A former OpenAI employee and whistleblower, Suchir Balaji, was found dead in his apartment in San Francisco, California, from an apparent suicide attempt.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drones, planes or UFOs? Americans abuzz over mysterious New Jersey sightings
item.description: CHATHAM, N.J. (AP) — That buzzing coming out of New Jersey? It's unclear if it's drones or something else, but for sure the nighttime sightings are producing tons of talk, a raft of conspiracy theories and craned necks looking skyward.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI and HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Suspected UnitedHealthcare CEO assassin draws Unabomber comparisons
item.description: Luigi Mangione, the suspected UnitedHealthcare CEO assassin, is being compared to Ted Kaczynski, the Unabomber and a fellow Ivy League alumnus.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American couple killed in Mexico, found shot in pickup truck: officials
item.description: Two Americans from California are dead after being found shot in a pickup truck while on vacation in Mexico, officials said.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas police arrest 9 suspects allegedly involved in 4 cases near suburban mall in shoplifting blitz operation
item.description: The Austin Police Department conducted a shoplifting blitz operation this week, arresting nine suspects for allegedly stealing $7,500 in merchandise in four cases.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lawmakers tell Apple, Google to prepare for TikTok ban
item.description: TikTok now plans to appeal to the Supreme Court and has asked the D.C. Circuit to put the law on hold while it appeals the case.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, KTLA 5

item.title: Memphis man guilty of killing wife during Fiji honeymoon
item.description: MEMPHIS, Tenn. -- A court in Fiji has convicted a Memphis man for the murder of his wife during their honeymoon in the island country more than two years ago, the victim's family confirmed Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Moon, NewsNation

item.title: These are the Trump appointees who have faced legal troubles
item.description: President-elect Trump has named several people to his next administration who have faced legal troubles — including Trump himself, who was convicted in a New York hush money case during his 2024 campaign.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, NewsNation

item.title: Woman who falsely accused Duke lacrosse players of rape in 2006 publicly admits she lied
item.description: The woman who in 2006 falsely accused three Duke University lacrosse players of raping her has admitted publicly for the first time that she made up the story.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Flight from LaGuardia diverts to JFK after bird strike: American Airlines
item.description: A flight from LaGuardia Airport to North Carolina was diverted to John F. Kennedy International Airport on Thursday evening due to a reported bird strike, according to American Airlines.
item.dc:creator: Erin Pflaumer, Fox 5

item.title: Missouri man Travis Timmerman, missing since June, freed from Syrian prison
item.description: A Missouri man found in Syria said early Friday he was freed following the overthrow of Syrian President Bashar Assad after seven months in prison.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Hammer, ABC 4

item.title: Police say suspect in UnitedHealthcare CEO killing wasn't a client of the insurer
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The man charged with killing UnitedHealthcare CEO Brian Thompson was not a client of the medical insurer and may have targeted it because of its size and influence, a senior police official said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WarnerBros. Discovery announces major corporate restructure
item.description: Media conglomerate WarnerBros. Discovery (WBD) announced a major restructuring of its business on Thursday, splitting its linear and streaming arms into two separate companies as it eyes potential mergers and acquisitions in the coming year.
item.dc:creator: Dominick Mastrangelo, Fox 5

item.title: Secretly recorded videos are backbone of corruption trial for longest-serving legislative leader
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Hours of secretly recorded videos and phone calls have offered a rare glimpse into how the longest-serving legislative leader in American history operated behind closed doors.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Amazing Kreskin, renowned mentalist and frequent late-night guest, dies at 89
item.description: The Amazing Kreskin, an entertainer and mentalist who rose to fame amid frequent appearances on TV talk shows like “The Tonight Show” and “The Mike Douglas Show,” has died, his family confirmed on social media. He was 89 years old.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, Fox 5

item.title: Fentanyl found inside dead dolphins in Gulf of Mexico
item.description: Drug smugglers using open waterways to move products may be affecting the health of sea life in the Gulf of Mexico
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, WFLA, NBC
